parameters.query:
SELECT
  e.id, e.name, e.status, c.name as client_name,
  COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.severity='critical' AND nf.remediation_status='open') as open_criticals,
  COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.severity='high' AND nf.remediation_status='open') as open_highs,
  COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.validation_status='pending_analyst') as pending_validation
FROM engagements e
JOIN clients c ON e.client_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN normalized_findings nf ON nf.engagement_id = e.id
WHERE e.id = '{{ $json.engagement_id }}'
GROUP BY e.id, e.name, e.status, c.name;

UPDATE engagements SET status='completed', closed_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.engagement_id }}';
UPDATE engagement_metrics SET
  total_findings = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE engagement_id='{{ $json.engagement_id }}'),
  validated_findings = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE engagement_id='{{ $json.engagement_id }}' AND validation_status IN ('validated','analyst_reviewed')),
  verified_fixed = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE engagement_id='{{ $json.engagement_id }}' AND remediation_status='verified_fixed'),
  false_positives = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE engagement_id='{{ $json.engagement_id }}' AND validation_status='likely_false_positive'),
  assets_tested = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets WHERE engagement_id='{{ $json.engagement_id }}' AND last_tested IS NOT NULL),
  coverage_pct = ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets WHERE engagement_id='{{ $json.engagement_id }}' AND last_tested IS NOT NULL) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets WHERE engagement_id='{{ $json.engagement_id }}'),0), 2),
  avg_mttr_days = (SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - first_seen))/86400),2) FROM normalized_findings WHERE engagement_id='{{ $json.engagement_id }}' AND closed_at IS NOT NULL),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE engagement_id = '{{ $json.engagement_id }}';

INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_type, actor, engagement_id, payload)
VALUES ('engagement_closed','{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.closed_by }}','{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.engagement_id }}','{"warnings":{{ JSON.stringify($('Build Close Summary').first().json.warnings) }},"lessons_learned":{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.lessons_learned ? "'" + $('Validate Input').first().json.lessons_learned.replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : '"none"' }}}'::jsonb);

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, engagement_id: $('Validate Input').first().json.engagement_id, status: 'completed', warnings: $('Build Close Summary').first().json.warnings, message: 'Engagement closed. Metrics finalized. Weakness heatmap triggered.' }) }}

meta.description: RECON OS WF-21: Engagement Close — archives engagement, finalizes metrics (MTTR, coverage, finding counts), warns on open criticals, triggers weakness heatmap analysis. POST /webhook/recon-os/engagement/close
